story.title: Connecting Global Markets with China's Specialty Oil Industry
story.description: CN-SpecLube Chain is a specialized supply chain service provider focused on connecting international buyers with China's specialty oil manufacturers. We offer comprehensive solutions including procurement coordination, quality assurance, logistics management, and customs documentation.
story.p2: Our team brings deep industry expertise and strong relationships with leading Chinese manufacturers. We serve as your strategic partner, ensuring seamless transactions and reliable product quality from sourcing to delivery.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide reliable, efficient, and transparent supply chain services that connect global buyers with China's specialty oil manufacturers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted bridge between international markets and China's specialty oil industry.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We ensure every product meets international standards

transformer.title: Transformer Oil
transformer.description: High-performance insulating oils for electrical equipment

hero.title: Premium Transformer Oil
hero.subtitle: High-Performance Insulating Oils for Electrical Equipment

overview.title: Product Overview
overview.description: We provide transformer oils from leading Chinese manufacturers, featuring excellent electrical insulation properties, thermal stability, and oxidation resistance for modern power systems.

feature1.title: Excellent Insulation
feature1.description: High dielectric strength for reliable electrical insulation

feature2.title: Thermal Stability
feature2.description: Superior heat dissipation and thermal performance

feature3.title: Oxidation Resistance
feature3.description: Extended service life with minimal degradation

cta.title: Need Technical Specifications?
cta.description: Contact our team for detailed product information and pricing

overview.title: Product Overview
overview.description: We provide rubber process oils from trusted Chinese producers, featuring high solvency (Cn% > 35%) and excellent compatibility with various rubber types. Our end-to-end solutions support seamless procurement for specialized industrial applications.

cta.title: Need Technical Specifications?
cta.description: Contact our team for detailed product information

overview.title: Product Overview
overview.description: We offer finished lubricants from professional Chinese manufacturers, formulated with advanced additive technology to deliver superior performance, extended equipment life, and reduced maintenance costs.

feature2.title: Oxidation Stability
feature2.description: Extended oil life and drain intervals

cta.title: Need Technical Specifications?

process.title: Our Quality Process
process.description: At CN-SpecLube Chain, we maintain rigorous quality control throughout our entire supply chain, from raw material sourcing to finished product delivery. Our commitment to quality ensures that every product meets the highest industry standards.

sourcing.title: Strategic Sourcing
sourcing.description: We partner with leading Chinese specialty oil manufacturers, carefully selecting suppliers known for their exceptional quality standards and consistent product excellence.

standards.title: International Standards
standards.description: All our products comply with international quality standards and specifications.

testing.title: Testing Methods
testing.description: Comprehensive testing ensures product quality and performance.

cta.title: Confidence in Every Drop
cta.description: Our commitment to quality ensures that you receive the best products for your industrial needs

bulk.title: Bulk Liquid Transportation
bulk.description: We offer efficient and cost-effective bulk liquid transportation solutions for our raw materials, designed to meet the specific requirements of the oil and lubricants industry.

isoTank.title: ISO Tank
isoTank.description: Stainless steel tanks designed for safe and efficient transportation of bulk liquids. Loading capacity varies by product density—typically 21,000-26,000L depending on the specific gravity of the liquid being transported.

flexibag.title: Flexibag
flexibag.description: Flexible intermediate bulk containers with heating pad available for temperature-sensitive products.

cost.title: Cost Efficient
cost.description: Reduced packaging costs and lower handling expenses

environment.title: Environmentally Friendly
environment.description: Minimized packaging waste and reduced carbon footprint

handling.title: Efficient Handling
handling.description: Simplified logistics and faster loading/unloading processes

packaged.title: Packaged Goods Transport
packaged.description: We offer flexible packaging options to meet your specific requirements.

drums.title: Drums
drums.description: 200L steel drums securely packed on wooden pallets for stability during transport.

ibc.title: IBC
ibc.description: 1000L intermediate bulk containers designed for efficient storage and handling with forklifts or pallet jacks.

smallPacks.title: Small Packs
smallPacks.description: 18L plastic buckets and smaller containers packed in sturdy cartons for safe transportation.

shipping.title: Global Shipping Routes
shipping.description: We ship to major ports worldwide with reliable transit times.

asiaNorthAmerica.ports: Qingdao, Tianjin → Los Angeles, New York

customs.title: Customs & Compliance
customs.description: We handle all customs documentation and compliance requirements.
